# Find Ad Creative Rejection Reasons

**Web Service Endpoint**

Fetches ad creative rejection reasons.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to find rejected approval reasons for ad creatives based on default or custom product page. See the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/ProductPageReason] object for rejection reason code enumerations, parameter descriptions, and [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Selector] condition operators.

### Payload example 1: Find ad creative rejection reasons



### Payload example 2: Find ad creative rejection reasons



## Ad Rejections

- **Get Ad Creative Rejection Reasons**: Fetches ad creative rejection reasons by custom product page ID.
- **Find App Assets**: Fetches app asset metadata by adam ID.
